name: youp-grid
description: Reusable TypeScript data grid core and UI adapters.
author: SeungyoupBaek

scripts.build: npm run build -w @youp-grid/core && npm run build -w @youp-grid/react && npm run build -w @youp-grid/vue
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm publish -w @youp-grid/core --access public --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/react --access public --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/vue --access public --dry-run
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:vue
